title: Mission Control
editorialSummary: Space missions sorted by objective type: crewed exploration (Apollo 11, Gemini 4, Vostok 1, Artemis I), robotic landers (Curiosity, Perseverance, Huygens, Surveyor 3), flyby/probe (Voyager 1, New Horizons, Pioneer 10, Cassini), and space telescope (Hubble, Kepler, Chandra, Spitzer). Each mission has one unambiguous objective class.
